description_long: This is a rectangular, amber-colored glass bottle filled with whisky, featuring a prominent black label on the front with white text and decorative borders. The label displays the 'Jack Daniel's' branding, along with 'Old No. 7 Brand' and 'Tennessee Whiskey' in stylized fonts, surrounded by ornate white flourishes. The bottle has a black screw cap closure, and the neck is relatively short and cylindrical, tapering slightly toward the top. The back of the bottle shows a secondary label with product information in white text on a black background. The bottle is accompanied by a gray wine glass, which is not part of the whisky object but appears in all views for scale reference.
description: A rectangular amber glass whisky bottle with a black and white Jack Daniel's label and a black screw cap, accompanied by a gray wine glass for scale.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed Jack Daniel's label and the black screw cap, with the wine glass to the right.
description_view_1: Rear angled view displaying the back label with product information and the wine glass partially in front.
description_view_2: Back view showing the plain amber glass surface with no label, and the wine glass to the left.
description_view_3: Side view highlighting the side label and the wine glass mostly obscured behind the bottle.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front of the bottle features a large, rectangular black label with ornate white borders and text. The label reads 'Jack Daniel's', 'Old No. 7 Brand', and 'Tennessee Whiskey' in stylized fonts, with additional decorative flourishes. The back of the bottle has a smaller black label with white text providing product and legal information. The labels are centered and cover most of the front and back faces of the bottle.
attribute_bottle_cap_type: Black screw cap, cylindrical in shape, likely made of plastic, with a smooth finish and no visible embossing or additional features.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: The neck is short, cylindrical, and slightly tapers toward the top, with a smooth surface and no visible embossing or decorative elements.
attribute_distillery_emblem: No separate emblem or crest is visible; the branding is integrated into the main front label design.
